alloy_matches.reason: Same ferritic low density steel with matching composition ranges (Al 5-9, Mn<5, C<0.05) and base element Fe.
Same ferrite-based duplex low density steel with matching composition ranges (Al 3-7, Mn 2-12, C 0.05-0.5).
Same austenite-based duplex low density steel (Triplex) with matching composition ranges (Al 5-10, Mn 5-30, C 0.4-0.7).
Same austenitic low density steel with matching composition ranges (Al 5-12, Mn 12-30, C 0.6-2.0).

process_matches.reason: Prediction process describes melting and homogenization (1100-1250C) which is part of the truth ferritic process.
Prediction hot rolling step corresponds to the hot rolling step explicitly in truth ferritic process.
Prediction cold rolling and recrystallization annealing matches the cold rolling and recrystallization step in truth ferritic process.
Prediction intercritical annealing process matches key steps in truth ferrite-based duplex process.
Prediction solution treatment (900-1100C, water/oil quench) matches the solution treatment step in truth austenitic process.
Prediction aging treatment (500-700C) matches the optional aging step in truth austenitic process.

sample_matches.reason: Both represent the final recrystallized ferritic steel condition after cold rolling and annealing, with matching alloy and process components.
Both represent the duplex ferrite-based steel after intercritical annealing, with matching alloy and process.
Prediction sample is the solution quenched state of the austenitic alloy, which is one condition covered by the truth sample (truth sample general, encompassing both solutionized and aged states).
Prediction sample is the aged state of the austenitic alloy, which is another condition covered by the truth sample.

truth.papers.A1.title: Current state of Fe-Mn-Al-C low density steels
truth.papers.A1.paper_scope: This review covers the physical metallurgy, processing strategies, strengthening mechanisms and mechanical properties of Fe-Mn-Al-C low density steels for automotive applications, and suggests future avenues.

prediction.papers.A1.title: Current state of Fe-Mn-Al-C low density steels
prediction.papers.A1.paper_scope: 本文综述了多年公开文献中Fe-Mn-Al-C低密度钢的物理冶金、加工策略、强化机制和力学性能，梳理了该类钢的分类、相图热力学、微观组织演化规律，总结了其拉伸、冲击、高应变率等性能特征，并提出了该合金在汽车领域未来应用的发展方向和待解决的关键问题

truth.alloys.alloy_ferritic.alloys_notes: Matrix is delta-ferrite; Al content above 7% leads to embrittlement due to ordering (K1, B2, DO3).
truth.alloys.alloy_ferritic_duplex.alloy_name: Ferrite based duplex low density steel
truth.alloys.alloy_ferritic_duplex.alloys_note: Hot-rolled microstructure: gamma + delta-ferrite, with delta-ferrite fraction >50%. Cold rolling and intercritical annealing produce TRIP/TWIP effects.
truth.alloys.alloy_austenitic_duplex.alloy_nam: Austenite based duplex low density steel
truth.alloys.alloy_austenitic_duplex.alloys_no: Hot-rolled: gamma + small fraction of delta-ferrite (<50%); often contains intragranular nano-sized kappa'-carbides and delta-ferrite stringers.
truth.alloys.alloy_austenitic.alloys_notes: Single-phase gamma after solution treatment; precipitation of kappa'-carbide when Al>7% and C>0.7%. Best properties in Al 7-10%, Mn 15-30%, C 0.7-1.2%.
truth.alloys.alloy_fe30mn1.2c.alloys_notes: Used as baseline in various figures to compare the effect of Al addition.

prediction.alloys.alloy_ferritic.alloys_notes: 高温热加工状态下为 elongated δ-ferrite组织，室温下根据Al含量可存在A2无序FeAl、B2有序FeAl或DO3有序Fe3Al相，Al含量超过7%易出现脆化
prediction.alloys.alloy_ferritic_duplex.alloy_name: Ferrite based duplex Fe-Mn-Al-C low density steel
prediction.alloys.alloy_ferritic_duplex.alloys_note: 热加工温度下为γ+δ-ferrite双相组织，δ-ferrite体积分数大于50%，可通过工艺控制获得双态组织，利用TRIP/TWIP效应提升强塑性匹配
prediction.alloys.alloy_austenitic_duplex.alloy_nam: Austenite based duplex Fe-Mn-Al-C low density steel
prediction.alloys.alloy_austenitic_duplex.alloys_no: 热加工温度下为γ+δ双相组织，γ为连续基体，室温组织通常为γ基体+少量δ-ferrite+晶内纳米κ'-carbide，δ相易转变为脆性B2/DO3有序相
prediction.alloys.alloy_austenitic.alloys_notes: 热加工温度下为全奥氏体组织，快冷后奥氏体可保持亚稳态，Al>7%且C>0.7%时可析出纳米级共格κ'-carbide产生显著时效硬化效应
prediction.alloys.alloy_fe_28mn_10al_1c.alloys_note: 固溶水淬态下延伸率可达~98.9%，抗拉强度~873MPa，变形机制为微带诱导塑性(MBIP)
prediction.alloys.alloy_fe_30mn_8al_12c.alloys_note: 固溶油淬态下延伸率~68%，抗拉强度~900MPa，变形机制为动态滑移带细化(DSBR)

truth.processes.proc_ferritic.description: Ingot casting, homogenization at 1100-1250 °C, hot rolling, cold rolling, recrystallization annealing at 700-950 °C.
truth.processes.proc_ferritic.processes_notes: Grain refinement limited; texture control via cold rolling and annealing.
truth.processes.proc_ferritic_duplex.descripti: Hot rolling in (delta+gamma) region, cold rolling, intercritical annealing at 700-900 °C followed by fast cooling or austempering.
truth.processes.proc_ferritic_duplex.processes: Austempering used to stabilize austenite. Control of austenite grain size and stability is critical for TRIP/TWIP.
truth.processes.proc_austenitic_duplex.descrip: Hot rolling in single gamma or (gamma+delta) region, solution treatment 900-1100 °C, water quenching; optional aging at 450-700 °C.
truth.processes.proc_austenitic_duplex.process: Process variants to control kappa-carbide precipitation and delta-ferrite morphology.
truth.processes.proc_austenitic.description: Solution treatment at 900-1100 °C in single-phase gamma region, water quenching; optional aging at 450-700 °C for kappa' precipitation hardening, or cold rolling + recrystallization annealing.
truth.processes.proc_austenitic.processes_note: Age hardening from intragranular kappa'-carbides; overaging leads to grain boundary kappa* and loss of ductility.
truth.processes.proc_fe30mn1.2c_ref.descriptio: Solution treatment at 1100 °C, water quenching (reference condition for TWIP).

prediction.processes.proc_ferritic.description: 热轧铁素体钢经冷轧后，在700-1000℃下进行再结晶退火，控制铁素体晶粒尺寸和织构，抑制Cube织构的形成
prediction.processes.proc_ferritic.processes_notes: 可添加微量Nb、Ti等微合金元素通过粒子激发形核机制细化晶粒
prediction.processes.proc_austenitic.description: 将固溶水淬后的试样在500-700℃下保温5-20h进行时效处理，析出纳米级κ'-carbide产生时效硬化
prediction.processes.proc_austenitic.processes_note: 时效温度过高或时间过长会导致晶界粗化κ*碳化物析出，显著降低塑性和韧性
prediction.processes.proc_ferritic_duplex.descripti: 冷轧双相钢在700-900℃临界区退火后，快速冷却至400℃左右进行等温淬火，调控残余奥氏体的稳定性以利用TRIP/TWIP效应

truth.processing_steps.sample_ferritic.process: Grain size 40-90 µm after annealing; texture random with Cube fibre.
Controls volume fraction, grain size and stability of austenite.
truth.processing_steps.sample_austenitic_duple: Precipitation of intragranular kappa'-carbides; longer times cause kappa* and alpha (B2/DO3).
truth.processing_steps.sample_austenitic.proce: For non-age hardenable grades; grain refinement and ductility restoration.

prediction.processing_steps.A1.processing_steps_not: 根据钢种类型选择再结晶退火、时效或等温淬火工艺

truth.structures.sample_ferritic.overall_struc: Elongated delta-ferrite bands with possible grain boundary kappa-carbides
truth.structures.sample_ferritic_duplex.overal: Banded mixture of coarse delta-ferrite and refined austenite (or transformation products)
truth.structures.sample_austenitic_duplex.over: Austenite matrix with delta-ferrite stringers and intragranular kappa' carbides
truth.structures.sample_austenitic.overall_str: Single-phase austenite with varying density of SRO / kappa' precipitates depending on aging
truth.structures.sample_austenitic.microstruct: depending on Al and C content

prediction.structures.sample_ferritic_hot_rolled.ov: 沿轧制方向拉长的δ-ferrite带组织，晶粒粗大
prediction.structures.sample_ferritic_hot_rolled.mi: 不均匀，存在粗大 elongated晶粒
prediction.structures.sample_austenitic.overall_str: 等轴奥氏体晶粒，含退火孪晶
prediction.structures.sample_ferritic_duplex.overal: 双态组织：粗大δ-ferrite基体+弥散分布的奥氏体/马氏体颗粒

truth.interfaces.sample_austenitic_duplex.phas: incoherent or semicoherent, crack initiation site
truth.interfaces.sample_austenitic_duplex.inte: Strain partitioning occurs between gamma and delta; gamma exhibits higher strain hardenability.
truth.interfaces.sample_austenitic_duplex.phas: During aging, kappa' coarsens and may lose coherency; grain boundary kappa* and alpha (B2/DO3) may form.
truth.interfaces.sample_austenitic.phases[aust: initially coherent (K-S OR), loses coherency upon coarsening
truth.interfaces.sample_austenitic.defect_inte: Shearing of kappa' carbides by dislocations enhances planar slip and reduces work hardening rate.
truth.interfaces.sample_austenitic.interface_n: Planar glide dominates; slip bands refine dynamically (DSBR) or form microbands (MBIP) depending on SRO/precipitates.
truth.interfaces.sample_austenitic.phase_evolu: Aging: SRO -> kappa' (L'12) -> kappa (E21); overaging: grain boundary kappa* and b-Mn.

prediction.interfaces.sample_austenitic.interface_n: 晶界粗化κ*碳化物易导致应力集中
κ'-carbide可被位错剪切，导致平面滑移
prediction.interfaces.sample_austenitic.phase_evolu: 长时间时效后κ*碳化物长大为层片状组织，严重降低塑性

160-175 GPa for Fe-20Mn-(7-10)Al-(0.7-1.2)C cold rolled and annealed; a 2% reduction per 1% Al addition
200 J/cm2 (CVN) at RT in solution-treated condition; much reduced after aging
truth.properties.sample_austenitic.chemical.co: far inferior to 304 stainless steel, comparable to conventional high strength steels

prediction.properties.sample_austenitic.physical.de: 每添加1wt%Al降低1.3%，奥氏体钢密度公式：8.15 - 0.101×wt%Al - 0.41×wt%C - 0.0085×wt%Mn g/cm³
prediction.properties.sample_austenitic.chemical.co: 与常规高强钢相当，无显著提升
prediction.properties.sample_ferritic.physical.dens: 铁素体钢密度公式：7.874 - 0.098×wt%Al g/cm³

truth.performance.sample_austenitic.comparativ: specific energy absorption ~0.5 J/mm3, similar to Mn TWIP steels and 50% higher than DC04/HSLA steels

prediction.performance.sample_austenitic.comparativ: Mn TWIP steel, conventional deep drawing steel, HSLA steel
比能量吸收较常规深冲钢高50%

truth.characterization_methods.idx_0.technique: OM, SEM, TEM, XRD, ECCI, APT
truth.characterization_methods.idx_0.purpose: Microstructural characterization of phases, precipitates, dislocations, and deformation mechanisms.
truth.characterization_methods.idx_0.key_findi: Revealed SRO, kappa' carbides, planar glide, deformation twins, ordered phases.
truth.characterization_methods.sample_austenit: Assess strength, elongation, strain hardening behaviour.
Yield strength 0.4-1.0 GPa, UTS 0.6-2.0 GPa, elongation 30-100% in austenitic steels; strain hardening dominated by planar glide and SRO/kappa' interaction.

prediction.characterization_methods.idx_0.purpose: 观察微观组织、析出相形貌、尺寸和晶体结构
prediction.characterization_methods.idx_0.key_findi: 观察到纳米级κ'-carbide尺寸2-30nm，与奥氏体基体共格，晶格失配<3%；观察到SRO、位错、微带、剪切带等变形亚结构
prediction.characterization_methods.idx_1.purpose: 物相鉴定、定量分析相含量、晶格常数测定
prediction.characterization_methods.idx_1.key_findi: 鉴定出γ-austenite、δ-ferrite、κ-carbide、B2、DO3等相；测定SFE与成分的关系
prediction.characterization_methods.idx_2.key_findi: 奥氏体钢固溶态屈服强度0.4-1.0GPa，抗拉强度0.6-2.0GPa，延伸率30-100%
prediction.characterization_methods.idx_3.key_findi: 固溶态奥氏体钢室温CVN冲击能量~200J/cm²，与奥氏体不锈钢相当；时效后冲击韧性大幅降低
prediction.characterization_methods.idx_4.purpose: 测定 crash工况下的能量吸收性能
prediction.characterization_methods.idx_4.key_findi: Al>7%的Fe-Mn-Al-C钢比能量吸收约0.5J/mm³，与TWIP钢相当，较常规深冲钢高50%

truth.computational_details.idx_0.validation_a: Reasonable agreement but deviations at high Mn and Al; e.g., calculated formation temperatures of kappa and M23C6 underestimated by up to 150 °C.
truth.computational_details.idx_0.analytical_m: Estimate density of ferritic and austenitic Fe-Mn-Al-C alloys
Composition boundary for intragranular kappa' precipitation
Based on critical lattice constant of austenite ~0.3670 nm.

prediction.computational_details.idx_0.validation_a: 预测的相区范围与实验值存在偏差，尤其是高Mn、高Al含量区域，需进一步完善热力学数据库
prediction.computational_details.idx_0.analytical_m: 计算不同成分的铁素体和奥氏体钢的密度
Al对密度的降低效果在铁素体和奥氏体中相近，C对奥氏体密度降低效果是Al的4倍
计算奥氏体的层错能，预测变形机制
Mn在0-20wt%范围内降低SFE，超过20wt%后每增加1wt%Mn，SFE增加1.2-3mJ/m²
SFE>80mJ/m²时变形机制以平面滑移为主，TWIP效应被抑制

truth.unmapped_findings.idx_0.value: Young's modulus of low density steels decreases by 2-2.5% per 1 wt% Al addition and is significantly lower than that of conventional HSLA steels (~160-175 GPa vs 210 GPa).
truth.unmapped_findings.idx_1.value: Addition of Al suppresses cementite precipitation and promotes short-range ordering (SRO) and kappa'-carbide, which leads to glide plane softening and planar slip.
truth.unmapped_findings.idx_2.value: Three new deformation mechanisms are introduced for high-SFE austenitic Fe-Mn-Al-C steels: microband induced plasticity (MBIP), dynamic slip band refinement (DSBR), and shear band induced plasticity (SIP).
truth.unmapped_findings.idx_3.value: Effective Al composition range for austenitic low-density steels with best mechanical properties is 7-10 wt% Al, with typical compositions: 15-30% Mn, 7-10% Al, 0.7-1.2% C.
truth.unmapped_findings.idx_4.value: The ferrite based duplex low-density steels can achieve a combination of TRIP and TWIP effects, showing UTS up to 900 MPa and total elongation up to 70%.
truth.unmapped_findings.idx_5.value: Specific stiffness of low density steels (E^(n)/rho) is not higher than that of HSLA steels and aluminium alloys; therefore, parts must be selected where stiffness is not the limiting factor.
truth.unmapped_findings.idx_6.value: Fatigue behaviour data are limited and conflicting; formability, weldability, and coatability are not well documented.
truth.unmapped_findings.idx_7.value: Corrosion resistance of Fe-Mn-Al-C alloys is not improved over conventional high strength steels; coating is needed for automotive applications.

prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_0.value: Fe-Mn-Al-C钢的应用性能如疲劳性能、成形性、焊接性、涂装性目前研究数据有限，无法充分评估其工业适用性
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_1.value: 现有热力学数据库对高Mn、高Al含量的Fe-Mn-Al-C钢的相边界和温度范围预测精度不足，需进一步完善
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_2.value: 高Al、高Mn含量带来的炼钢、连铸、热轧过程中的工艺问题如喷嘴堵塞、表面氧化层难以去除、热开裂等制约其工业化生产
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_3.value: 高Al、高C含量的峰时效Fe-Mn-Al-C钢出现的负加工硬化率现象的微观机制尚未完全明确
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_4.value: Fe-Mn-Al-C钢的杨氏模量较低，每添加1wt%Al降低2-2.5%，限制了其在对刚度要求较高的汽车零件上的应用
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_5.value: Al含量>7%且C>0.7%是奥氏体钢中析出纳米共格κ'-carbide产生有效时效硬化的必要条件
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_6.value: 高SFE奥氏体钢中存在的短程有序(SRO)导致的滑移面软化是平面滑移变形的主要原因，衍生出MBIP、DSBR、SIP等新型变形机制
prediction.unmapped_findings.idx_7.value: 铁素体基双相钢可通过工艺控制实现TRIP/TWIP效应，强塑性匹配优于第一代先进高强钢
